title: SRS Discovery — RFC-012
description: Defines DiscoveryQuery, TextSegment, and ConformanceScenario shapes for the SRS Discovery Contract (ext:discovery).

DiscoveryQuery.title: DiscoveryQuery
DiscoveryQuery.description: A conjunction of zero or more structured filter predicates. All properties are optional; absent predicates are wildcards. An instance matches when it satisfies every specified predicate.

containerId.description: Instance is a member of this container per the three-condition definition (RFC-009 I-66).

tag.description: AND-conjunction: the instance must carry all specified tag strings. RFC-006 vocabulary resolution applied when a Vocabulary is declared.

lifecycleState.description: Exact match on Record.lifecycleState. Requires ext:lifecycle; implementations without it MUST treat this field as absent.

contentMatch.description: Free-text predicate. The implementation MUST return every instance whose Text Projection contains at least one segment whose normalized text contains the normalized form of this string as a substring (recall-floor guarantee, RFC-012 R2).

TextSegment.title: TextSegment
TextSegment.description: One searchable unit from an instance's Text Projection. The projection is derived at query time from stored field values; it is not stored.

fieldId.description: The field definition's UUID for package-resolved fields; a sentinel string for special segments (e.g. 'tag', 'label', 'note-title', 'note-section', 'typed-record-title', 'typed-record-field').

fieldName.description: The field definition's name (snake_case) for package-resolved fields; a sentinel string for special segments.

text.description: The raw stored text value. Normalization (NFC + Unicode simple lowercasing) is applied at match time, not at segment construction time.

ConformanceScenario.title: ConformanceScenario
ConformanceScenario.description: A named query scenario for conformance testing. Implementations that declare ext:discovery MUST satisfy all scenarios in srs/conformance/discovery/scenarios.json.

query.description: The DiscoveryQuery to execute against the fixture repo.

expectedInstanceIds.description: The required result set. When exactMatch is true, the implementation must return exactly this set. When exactMatch is false, the implementation must return at least this set.

exactMatch.description: If true, the result must equal exactly the expectedInstanceIds set (structured-filter scenario). If false, the result must be a superset of expectedInstanceIds (content-match recall-floor scenario).
